system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.mes_quytrinh_sanpham_demo","body":"
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[MES_QUYTRINH_SANPHAM_DEMO]
(
	@masp nvarchar(200),
	@mact nvarchar(max)
)
AS
BEGIN
	--DECLARE @masp nvarchar(200), @mact nvarchar(50);

	--SELECT @masp = masp, @mact = mact
	--FROM mes_quytrinh_sanpham A
	--WHERE id = @routID

	--SELECT * 
	--FROM mes_quytrinh_sanpham A
	--WHERE masp = @masp AND mact = @mact
	DECLARE @card_no nvarchar(50) = '123456789'

	SELECT A.id, 'DQH-VFM**/****' AS dondathang,
		A.masp, B.tensp, NULL AS tensp_vn, B.hehang,
		NULL AS hinhanh, A.masp AS mahtr, NULL AS cumchitiet,
		A.stt, A.mact, A.chitiet AS tenct, A.nguyenlieu,
		A.dayy_tc, A.rong_tc, A.dai_tc, A.soluong_tc,
		A.dayy_sc, A.rong_sc, A.dai_sc, A.soluong_sc,
		NULL AS dayy_phoi, NULL AS ghichu,
		NULL AS veneer_matchinh, NULL AS veneer_matphu,	NULL AS ghichu2, 
		NULL AS bemat, NULL AS somat_giacong,
		CAST(0 AS BIT) AS cc_canh1, CAST(0 AS BIT) AS cc_canh2, 
		CAST(0 AS BIT) AS cc_dau1, CAST(0 AS BIT) AS cc_dau2, 
		CAST(0 AS BIT) AS cc_mat1, CAST(0 AS BIT) AS cc_mat2,
		CONCAT(@card_no, '-', A.mact) AS card_no, 'M' AS card_type, 
		A.soluong_tc AS soluong, 1 AS soluong_donhang
	FROM mes_dinhmuc_govan A
		INNER JOIN tr_sanpham_nhamay B ON A.masp = B.masp_nhamay
	WHERE A.masp = @masp AND A.mact IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM([value])) FROM dbo.fn_Split(@mact, ','));

    SELECT A.*, B.n_op, C.tenkhuvuc, CONCAT(@card_no, '-', A.mact) AS card_no
    FROM mes_quytrinh_sanpham A
    	LEFT JOIN trtb_m_op B ON A.quytrinh = B.c_op
    	LEFT JOIN tr_khuvuc_sanxuat C ON B.department = C.makhuvuc
    WHERE A.masp = @masp 
		AND A.mact IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM([value])) FROM dbo.fn_Split(@mact, ',')) 
		AND A.active = 1
    	AND ISNULL(A.quytrinh, '') <> ''
    ORDER BY A.buoc;
END
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.fn_split","dbo.mes_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.mes_quytrinh_sanpham","dbo.tr_khuvuc_sanxuat","dbo.tr_sanpham_nhamay","dbo.trtb_m_op"],"writesTables":[],"flags":[],"suggestedTier":"B"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
